The '''''Ben Het''''' was a [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] used by the [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]].

==History==
[[File:CRL_Ben_Het_TIE95.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Cruiser ''Ben Het'' under attack by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]].]]
The ''Ben Het'' attacked the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory I-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']] with [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] while the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship was receiving the new [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from the [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] ''[[Tropsobor]]'' during the [[Sepan campaign]]. However, ''Ben Het'' was destroyed by [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] with help from Imperial Pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

{{Ship-stub}}

*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
